class.name: MarkdownLabel
class.brief_description: A Control node for rendering Markdown text with scroll, text selection, search, and streaming support.
class.description:
MarkdownLabel is a [Control] node that renders Markdown text. It provides scrolling, text selection, text search, link click detection, and streaming text support suitable for real-time output (e.g., AI chat).
Supported Markdown features: - ATX headings (h1–h6) - Fenced code blocks with optional language tag - Blockquotes (including nested) - Ordered and unordered lists, task lists - Thematic breaks (horizontal rules) - Inline formatting: bold, italic, bold-italic, inline code, strikethrough, ==highlight== - Links ([code][url]text[/url][/code]) and images - Footnotes ([code][^id][/code] reference and [code][^id]: definition[/code]) - Tables
[b]Streaming:[/b] When [member streaming_enabled] is [code]true[/code], [method append_text] performs incremental re-parsing of only the unstable tail region (controlled by [member max_unstable_lines]). Call [method finish_stream] after the last append to force a full re-parse for correct final layout.
[b]Theme:[/b] All visual properties are read from the Godot theme system under the type name [code]"MarkdownLabel"[/code]. See the project documentation for the complete list of theme properties (fonts, font sizes, colors, styleboxes, constants, and icons).
[b]Note:[/b] This node programmatically creates its internal scroll container, margin container, and canvas children in [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_ENTER_TREE]. Do not add child nodes manually.

method.name: activate_link_uri
method.description: Activates the given link URI. Emits the [signal link_pressed] signal. If [member open_external_links] is [code]true[/code] and the URI starts with [code]http://[/code] or [code]https://[/code], opens it in the system default browser.

method.name: append_text
method.description: Appends [param delta] to the current Markdown text. When [member streaming_enabled] is [code]true[/code], only the unstable tail region is re-parsed for performance. When [member auto_scroll] is [code]true[/code] and the scroll bar is near the bottom, the view automatically scrolls to stay at the bottom.

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears all Markdown text and resets the document state. Emits [signal text_changed].

method.name: clear_selection
method.description: Clears the current text selection.

method.name: finish_stream
method.description: Forces a full re-parse of the entire document. Call this after the last [method append_text] call to ensure correct final layout. Respects [member auto_scroll] behavior.

method.name: get_anchors
method.description: Returns the list of all heading anchor IDs in the document.

method.name: get_content_height
method.description: Returns the total content height in pixels, or [code]1.0[/code] if the canvas has not been created yet.

method.name: get_content_margin
method.description: Returns the content margin in pixels. The default value is [code]16[/code].

method.name: get_extra_font_size
method.description: Returns the additional font size added to all text in the document. The default value is [code]0[/code].

method.name: get_h_scroll_bar
method.description: Returns the internal horizontal scroll bar, or [code]null[/code] if the control has not been created yet. Typically not useful since horizontal scrolling is disabled by default.

method.name: get_link_uri_at_point
method.description: Returns the URI of the link at the given local position (relative to the MarkdownLabel), or an empty string if no link is under the position.

method.name: get_markdown_text
method.description: Returns the current raw Markdown text.

method.name: get_max_unstable_lines
method.description: Returns the maximum number of unstable lines used for incremental re-parsing. The default value is [code]32[/code].

method.name: get_menu
method.description: Returns the internal [PopupMenu] used for the context menu. The menu is lazily created on first access.

method.name: get_open_external_links
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if external links (http/https) are automatically opened in the system browser.

method.name: get_rendered_block_count
method.description: Returns the number of rendered top-level Markdown blocks, or [code]0[/code] if the canvas has not been created yet.

method.name: get_selected_text
method.description: Returns the currently selected plain text, or an empty string if nothing is selected.

method.name: get_v_scroll_bar
method.description: Returns the internal vertical scroll bar, or [code]null[/code] if the control has not been created yet.

method.name: has_anchor
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the document contains a heading with the given anchor ID.

method.name: is_auto_scroll
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if auto-scroll is enabled. The default value is [code]true[/code].

method.name: is_context_menu_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the right-click context menu is enabled. The default value is [code]false[/code].

method.name: is_deselect_on_focus_loss_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the selection is automatically cleared when the node loses focus. The default value is [code]true[/code].

method.name: is_drag_and_drop_selection_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if drag-and-drop of selected text is enabled. The default value is [code]true[/code].

method.name: is_menu_visible
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the context menu is currently visible.

method.name: is_selection_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if text selection is enabled. The default value is [code]true[/code].

method.name: is_shortcut_keys_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+C, Ctrl+A) are enabled. The default value is [code]true[/code].

method.name: is_streaming_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if streaming mode is enabled. The default value is [code]false[/code].

method.name: load_markdown_file
method.description: Loads Markdown text from the file at [param path] and sets it as the document content. Returns [constant OK] on success, or an error code such as [constant ERR_FILE_CANT_OPEN] if the file could not be opened. Emits [signal text_changed] on success.

method.name: menu_option
method.description: Handles a menu option selection by its identifier. Typically used with the IDs from the [enum MenuItems] enum.

method.name: refresh
method.description: Marks the layout as dirty and triggers a redraw. Call this after changing theme properties to force a visual update.

method.name: scroll_to_anchor
method.description: Scrolls to the heading with the given anchor ID. [param align] controls where the anchor appears in the viewport: [code]0.0[/code] (top) to [code]1.0[/code] (bottom). Returns [code]false[/code] if the anchor does not exist.

method.name: scroll_to_search_result
method.description: Scrolls to the current search result (set by a previous [method search] call). [param align] controls where the result appears in the viewport: [code]0.0[/code] (top) to [code]1.0[/code] (bottom). Returns [code]false[/code] if there is no active search result.

method.name: search
method.description: Searches the document for [param text] starting from ([param from_line], [param from_column]). [param flags] is a bitmask: [code]1[/code] = match case, [code]2[/code] = whole words, [code]4[/code] = search backwards. Returns the line and column of the match as a [Vector2i], or [code]Vector2i(-1, -1)[/code] if no match was found. The match is highlighted on screen.

method.name: select_all
method.description: Selects all text in the document.

method.name: set_auto_scroll
method.description: Sets whether auto-scroll is enabled. When [code]true[/code] and the scroll bar is near the bottom, the view automatically scrolls to stay at the bottom when text is appended (via [method append_text] or [method finish_stream]).

method.name: set_content_margin
method.description: Sets the content margin in pixels. Clamped to the range [code][0, 128][/code]. The default value is [code]16[/code].

method.name: set_context_menu_enabled
method.description: Sets whether the right-click context menu is enabled.

method.name: set_deselect_on_focus_loss_enabled
method.description: Sets whether the text selection is automatically cleared when the node loses focus.

method.name: set_drag_and_drop_selection_enabled
method.description: Sets whether drag-and-drop of selected text is enabled.

method.name: set_extra_font_size
method.description: Sets an additional font size added to all text in the document. Clamped to the range [code][0, 16][/code]. Emits [signal extra_font_size_changed].

method.name: set_markdown_text
method.description: Sets the Markdown text to render. Emits [signal text_changed]. Resets the current selection and search state.

method.name: set_max_unstable_lines
method.description: Sets the maximum number of unstable lines for incremental re-parsing in streaming mode. Clamped to the range [code][1, 256][/code]. The default value is [code]32[/code].

method.name: set_open_external_links
method.description: Sets whether external links (http/https) are automatically opened in the system default browser when clicked.

method.name: set_selection_enabled
method.description: Sets whether text selection with the mouse is enabled.

method.name: set_shortcut_keys_enabled
method.description: Sets whether keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+C to copy, Ctrl+A to select all) are enabled.

method.name: set_streaming_enabled
method.description: Sets whether streaming mode is enabled. When [code]true[/code], [method append_text] performs incremental re-parsing for better performance with real-time text output.

members.member: If [code]true[/code], the view automatically scrolls to the bottom when text is appended and the scroll bar is already near the bottom.
The content margin in pixels. Controls the padding between the MarkdownLabel edges and the rendered content.
If [code]true[/code], a context menu with Copy and Select All options appears on right-click.
If [code]true[/code], the text selection is automatically cleared when the node loses focus.
If [code]true[/code], selected text can be dragged and dropped to other controls.
Additional font size added to all text sizes in the document. Clamped to [code][0, 16][/code]. Can also be changed by the user with Ctrl+MouseWheel.
Maximum number of lines from the end of the document that are re-parsed on each [method append_text] call in streaming mode. Clamped to [code][1, 256][/code].
If [code]true[/code], clicking an http/https link opens it in the system default browser.
If [code]true[/code], text can be selected with the mouse.
If [code]true[/code], keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+C, Ctrl+A) are handled by the control.
If [code]true[/code], [method append_text] performs incremental re-parsing. Enable this for real-time text streaming scenarios.
The Markdown text to render. Setting this property resets the selection and search state.

signal.name: extra_font_size_changed
signal.description: Emitted when [member extra_font_size] changes, either programmatically or via Ctrl+MouseWheel.

signal.name: link_pressed
signal.description: Emitted when a link is clicked. [param uri] is the target URL. If [member open_external_links] is [code]true[/code], http/https links are also opened in the browser automatically.

signal.name: render_warning
signal.description: Emitted when the Markdown parser encounters a warning, such as a broken image or an unrecognized block type.

signal.name: text_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the Markdown text changes via [method set_markdown_text], [method append_text], [method clear], or [method load_markdown_file].

constants.constant: Context menu item ID for the Copy action.
Context menu item ID for the Select All action.
Represents the total number of menu items. Used for bounds checking.
